name: Eden Club - Private Indoor Trackman Golf Simulator
about: Eden Club is a private indoor facility providing 24/7 member access to two TrackMan 4 simulator bays and a full-size indoor pickleball court. Additional membership amenities include putting practice areas, a play area for children, and a dedicated office space.
who_its_for: Private members seeking 24/7 access to golf and pickleball facilities in a shared, non-staffed environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Golfers appreciate the 24/7 access to professional-grade TrackMan 4 technology and the convenience of practicing or playing virtual courses at any time without needing a reservation.
